skills.name: Quick Draw
skills.description: Draws the pistol quickly to attack the target .
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Fanning
skills.description: Fires shots with 3 pistols in turn towards the designated area. The skill is activated while the key is held down and put to stop when the key is released.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 15
Targets: CaptionRatio2 ~ CaptionRatio
Max. Duration: 1.5 seconds

skills.name: Westraid
skills.description: Reloads the pistol to give a buff that makes the player’s attack hit the target with 100% accuracy for a specified number of attacks.
skills.effect_text:
Number of accurate attacks: x CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Peacemaker
skills.description: Throws a fatal explosive at the target to deal damage that ignores part of the enemy's defense and renders them sluggish. Silence and Fatigue debuffs are applied to targeted enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
Ignores 10% defense
[Silence] Duration: CaptionTime seconds
[Peacemaker: Fatigue] Duration: CaptionRatio seconds

skills.name: Redemption
skills.description: Applies a buff that increases Final Evasion for a duration and increases movement speed. You can not evade attacks that apply by 100%.
skills.effect_text:
Final EVA: CaptionRatio2 %
Increases Movement Speed by CaptionRatio
Buff Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Aiming Shot
skills.description: Fires an unevadable shot into an area. Targeted enemies will have their buffs removed and deals additional damage that depends on the number of removed buffs.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds
Maximum number of buffs removed: CaptionRatio
Additional damage per removed buff: + CaptionRatio2 %

attributes.name: Quick Draw: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Quick Draw] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fanning: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fanning] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Peacemaker: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Peacemaker] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Aiming Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Aiming Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Aiming Shot: Coup de Grace
attributes.description:
* Fixes the number of buffs removed by [Aiming Shot] to 1 while fixing the additional damage value at 200%

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Redemption: Escape
attributes.description:
* The movement speed increase from [Redemption] is increased additionally by 2x while its duration is halved

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Peacemaker: Disarm
attributes.description:
* If the player was attacked by [Peacemaker], the main slot of the target is disarmed by a 1% chance per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

* Increases Cooldown by 5 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Westraid: Final Roulette
attributes.description: *[Westraid] now grants 150% increased critical strike chance instead of the original effect, and this effect decreases by 5% every second.

attributes.name: [Arts] Peacemaker: Shotgun
attributes.description: * [Peacemaker] spreads bullets around the target, dealing damage to enemies nearby. It no longer inflicts [Silence].

attributes.name: [Arts] Quick Draw: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Quick Draw] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fanning: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fanning] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Peacemaker: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Peacemaker] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Aiming Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Aiming Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Sheriff: Reload
attributes.description:
* Stack 3 [Reload] buff that lasts for 50 seconds when the cooldown of Sheriff attack skills are reset (Maximum 10 stacks)

* Final Damage of Sheriff skill increases by 1.5% per 1 stack

attributes.name: [Arts] Aiming Shot: PM Shot
attributes.description:
* Aiming Shot only hits the target under [Pacemaker: Fatigue] debuff

* Unable to change direction and move. Activates by full Casting

* Casting time added by 0.5 seconds

* Increases cooldown by 5 seconds

attributes.name: Redemption: Instant Escape
attributes.description:
* When using [Redemption], consumes 5 stacks of Reload to instantly move forward.

* Movement distance: [40 + skill level * 4]
